parameters.name: ops
parameters.label: Operators
parameters.description: The operators determine where to obtain the channels. Specify or more operator names or paths. Examples: , , , . Or select the operators using the menu.

parameters.name: parameters
parameters.label: Parameters
parameters.description: The list of parameters names (which can include wildcards) you want to get from the (s). One or more parameter, or * for all parameters. You can also specify a "NOT" selection with an . Or select the

parameters.name: includeopname
parameters.label: Include Op Name
parameters.description: Adds the OP name to the beginning of each parameter name in the table

parameters.name: renamefrom
parameters.label: Rename from
parameters.description: See Pattern Matching.

parameters.name: renameto
parameters.label: Rename to
parameters.description: See Pattern Expansion.

parameters.name: custom
parameters.label: Custom
parameters.description: Output the operators' custom parameters.

parameters.name: builtin
parameters.label: Built-In
parameters.description: Output the operators' built-in parameters.

parameters.name: header
parameters.label: Header
parameters.description: Outputs the column headers.

parameters.name: name
parameters.label: Name
parameters.description: Outputs the parameter name.

parameters.name: value
parameters.label: Value
parameters.description: Outputs the evaluated parameter value.

parameters.name: eval
parameters.label: Eval
parameters.description: Outputs the evaluated parameter value as a python object.

parameters.name: constant
parameters.label: Constant
parameters.description: Outputs the current constant value of the parameter.

parameters.name: expression
parameters.label: Expression
parameters.description: Outputs the current python expression of the parameter.

parameters.name: export
parameters.label: Export
parameters.description: Outputs the export path of the parameter.

parameters.name: mode
parameters.label: Mode
parameters.description: Outputs the current mode of the parameter (constant, expression, or export).

parameters.name: style
parameters.label: Style
parameters.description: Outputs what format the parameter is (eg. Float for float parameters, Menu for menu parameters etc.).

parameters.name: tupletname
parameters.label: Tuplet Name
parameters.description: Outputs the name of the tuplet the parameter is in. For example, tx on the Geometry is a part of the 't' tuplet.

parameters.name: size
parameters.label: Size
parameters.description: Outputs the size of the tuplet. For example, tx on the Geometry would have a tuplet size of 3 since it's a part of the 't' tuplet with 3 parameters.

parameters.name: path
parameters.label: Path
parameters.description: Outputs the path to the node.

parameters.name: menuindex
parameters.label: Menu Index
parameters.description: If the parameter is a menu, then output the selected index of the menu.

parameters.name: minmax
parameters.label: Min/Max
parameters.description: Outputs the minimum and maximum values of the parameter. These values will clamp the value parameter to be within the range. If clampmin is 0 then the minimum will not clamp and the row/column entry w

parameters.name: clampminmax
parameters.label: Clamp Min/Max
parameters.description: Outputs whether or not the parameter has a clamped min or clamped max. If true, then the values are defined by min/max columns.

parameters.name: normminmax
parameters.label: Norm Min/Max
parameters.description: Outputs the minimum and maximum values of the parameter in the interface (ie. the minimum and maximum values of a slider).

parameters.name: default
parameters.label: Default
parameters.description: Outputs the default value of the parameter

parameters.name: enabled
parameters.label: Enabled
parameters.description: Outputs whether the parameter is currently enabled

parameters.name: readonly
parameters.label: Read Only
parameters.description: Outputs whether the parameter is currently read-only

parameters.name: section
parameters.label: Section
parameters.description: Outputs whether the parameter has a section divider/separator (ie. line) above it.

parameters.name: menunames
parameters.label: Menu Names
parameters.description: Outputs a list of the menu names for any menu parameters.

parameters.name: menulabels
parameters.label: Menu Labels
parameters.description: Outputs a list of the menu labels for any menu parameters.

parameters.name: language
parameters.label: Language
parameters.description: Select how the decides which script language to operate on.

parameters.name: extension
parameters.label: Edit/View Extension
parameters.description: Select the file extension this should expose to external editors.

parameters.name: customext
parameters.label: Custom Extension
parameters.description: Specifiy the custom extension.

parameters.name: wordwrap
parameters.label: Word Wrap
parameters.description: Enable Word Wrap for Node Display.

parameters.name: pargroupname
parameters.label: Pargroupname
parameters.description: Help Not Available.

parameters.name: numblocks
parameters.label: Numblocks
parameters.description: Help Not Available.

parameters.name: blockindex
parameters.label: Blockindex
parameters.description: Help Not Available.

parameters.label: Pages

parameters.description: Help Not Available.

parameters.label: Basename
parameters.description: Help Not Available.

parameters.name: pargroups
